name: io.github.gabrielcerutti/etoro-mcp-server
title: eToro MCP Server
description: Connect AI assistants to eToro for portfolio analysis, market research, and trading.

environmentVariables.name: ETORO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your eToro API key (x-api-key header value).

environmentVariables.name: ETORO_USER_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your eToro user key (x-user-key header value) tied to your account.

environmentVariables.name: ETORO_TRADING_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Use 'demo' for the practice account or 'real' for live trading.
